# Desktop Agent Paper Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Write a complete academic paper "面向桌面场景的多模态分层智能体：意图识别、视觉感知与工作流编排" with LaTeX source, figures, and all 7 sections.

**Architecture:** Paper uses XeLaTeX + CTeX for Chinese typesetting, BibTeX for references, matplotlib for figures. Each section in a separate `.tex` file, assembled by `main.tex`. Figures generated by Python scripts using actual project data.

**Tech Stack:** XeLaTeX, CTeX, BibTeX, matplotlib, PIL/Pillow, Python 3.11

**Design Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-03-desktop-agent-paper-design.md`

---

## File Structure

```
paper/
├── main.tex                          # 主文件，组装所有章节
├── references.bib                    # BibTeX 引用数据库（19 篇）
├── sections/
│   ├── 01-introduction.tex           # §1 Introduction (~1.5 页)
│   ├── 02-related-work.tex           # §2 Related Work (~3 页)
│   ├── 03-method.tex                 # §3 Method (~5 页)
│   ├── 04-experiments.tex            # §4 Experiments (~3 页)
│   ├── 05-discussion.tex             # §5 Discussion (~1.5 页)
│   └── 06-conclusion.tex             # §6 Conclusion (~0.5 页)
├── figures/
│   ├── architecture.pdf              # 图 1: 系统架构框图
│   ├── yolo_detection_case1.png      # 图 2a: YOLOv8 检测-多标签浏览
│   ├── yolo_detection_case2.png      # 图 2b: YOLOv8 检测-文件管理
│   ├── yolo_detection_case3.png      # 图 2c: YOLOv8 检测-空闲屏幕
│   └── workflow_case.png             # 图 3: 工作流执行对话截图
└── scripts/
    ├── generate_architecture.py      # 生成架构框图
    ├── capture_yolo_detections.py    # 运行 YOLOv8 推理并绘制 bbox
    └── capture_workflow_case.py      # 截取工作流执行日志
```

---

### Task 1: Project Setup — LaTeX 模板与目录结构

**Files:**
- Create: `paper/main.tex`
- Create: `paper/references.bib`

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 paper 目录结构**

```bash
mkdir -p paper/sections paper/figures paper/scripts
```

- [ ] **Step 2: 编写 main.tex 主文件**

```latex
\documentclass[a4paper,11pt]{article}
\usepackage[UTF8]{ctex}
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage[margin=2.5cm]{geometry}
\usepackage{listings}
\usepackage{algorithm}
\usepackage{algorithmic}
\usepackage{caption}
\usepackage{subcaption}
\usepackage{float}

\graphicspath{{figures/}}

\title{面向桌面场景的多模态分层智能体：意图识别、视觉感知与工作流编排}
\author{}
\date{}

\begin{document}
\maketitle

\input{sections/01-introduction}
\input{sections/02-related-work}
\input{sections/03-method}
\input{sections/04-experiments}
\input{sections/05-discussion}
\input{sections/06-conclusion}

\bibliographystyle{ieeetr}
\bibliography{references}

\end{document}
```

- [ ] **Step 3: 编写 references.bib 骨架**

```bibtex
@misc{chase2022langchain,
  author = {Harrison Chase},
  title = {LangChain: Building applications with LLMs through composability},
  year = {2022},
  howpublished = {\url{https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain}}
}

@misc{langgraph2024,
  author = {{LangChain Inc.}},
  title = {LangGraph: Build stateful, multi-actor applications with LLMs},
  year = {2024},
  howpublished = {\url{https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph}}
}
```

### Task 2: Write §1 Introduction

**Files:**
- Create: `paper/sections/01-introduction.tex`

- [ ] **Step 1: 编写 01-introduction.tex**

内容来源：设计文档 §1.1-§1.4。注意：
- §1.1 背景动机：1 段，~150 词
- §1.2 问题陈述：1 段，列出 4 个不足，~100 词
- §1.3 方法概述：1 段，简述三层架构 + 视觉管线，~120 词
- §1.4 贡献：编号列表，4 条，直接从设计文档复制
- 引用标记：方法概述中提及 LangGraph 时加 `\cite{langgraph2024}`，提及 YOLOv8 时加 `\cite{jocher2023yolov8}`

```latex
\section{Introduction}
\subsection{Background and Motivation}
% ~150 words: LLM agent发展 → 桌面场景需求 → 多模态/多意图/工作流

\subsection{Problem Statement}
% ~100 words: 4个不足（分层/意图/视觉/工作流）

\subsection{Method Overview}
% ~120 words: 三层架构 + YOLOv8 + LangGraph，引用 [2][13]

\subsection{Contributions}
% 编号列表，4条，从设计文档1.4复制
```

- [ ] **Step 2: 编译验证**


- [ ] **Step 3: 编写 generate_architecture.py**

生成图 1 架构框图。使用 matplotlib 绘制三层矩形框 + 箭头 + 标注。

```python
"""Generate architecture diagram for paper Figure 1."""
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 1, figsize=(8, 10))
ax.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax.set_ylim(0, 14)
ax.axis('off')

# Layer 1: Routing Guard
layer1 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((1, 10), 8, 2.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1",
                                  facecolor='#E3F2FD', edgecolor='#1565C0', linewidth=2)
ax.add_patch(layer1)
ax.text(5, 11.8, 'Layer 1: Routing Guard', ha='center', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax.text(5, 11.2, 'Keyword Gate + LLM Param Extractor + YOLOv8', ha='center', fontsize=9)
ax.text(5, 10.6, 'Visual Context Analyzer', ha='center', fontsize=9)

# Arrow 1→2
ax.annotate('', xy=(5, 9.5), xytext=(5, 10),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', lw=2, color='#1565C0'))
ax.text(5.3, 9.7, 'RoutingDecision', fontsize=8, color='#1565C0')

# Layer 2: Roleplay Agent
layer2 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((1, 6.5), 8, 2.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1",
                                  facecolor='#FFF3E0', edgecolor='#E65100', linewidth=2)
ax.add_patch(layer2)
ax.text(5, 8.3, 'Layer 2: Roleplay Agent', ha='center', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax.text(5, 7.7, 'Persona Prompt (2 sets) + Mood Tracker', ha='center', fontsize=9)
ax.text(5, 7.1, 'Expression / Quip Generator', ha='center', fontsize=9)

# Arrow 2→3
ax.annotate('', xy=(5, 5.5), xytext=(5, 6.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', lw=2, color='#E65100'))

# Layer 3: Work Engine
layer3 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((1, 2), 8, 3, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1",
                                  facecolor='#E8F5E9', edgecolor='#2E7D32', linewidth=2)
ax.add_patch(layer3)
ax.text(5, 4.5, 'Layer 3: Work Engine (LangGraph)', ha='center', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax.text(5, 3.9, 'Agent Loop / Coding / File / Repair / Summary', ha='center', fontsize=9)
ax.text(5, 3.3, '5 Subgraphs', ha='center', fontsize=9)

# Input arrow
ax.annotate('', xy=(5, 12.5), xytext=(5, 13.2),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', lw=2, color='black'))
ax.text(5, 13.4, 'Input (Text / Screenshot)', ha='center', fontsize=10)

# Output arrow
ax.annotate('', xy=(5, 1.3), xytext=(5, 2),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', lw=2, color='#2E7D32'))
ax.text(5, 1.0, 'Output (Text / Expression / File Ops / Quip)', ha='center', fontsize=10)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('paper/figures/architecture.pdf', bbox_inches='tight', dpi=300)
plt.savefig('paper/figures/architecture.png', bbox_inches='tight', dpi=300)
print("Architecture diagram saved.")
```


### Task 7: Generate Experiment Figures — YOLOv8 Detection & Workflow Cases

**Files:**
- Create: `paper/scripts/capture_yolo_detections.py`
- Create: `paper/scripts/capture_workflow_case.py`

- [ ] **Step 1: 编写 capture_yolo_detections.py**

运行 YOLOv8 推理，对 3 种场景的截图绘制 bbox 并保存。

```python
"""Capture YOLOv8 detection results for paper Figure 2."""
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, 'backend')

from pathlib import Path
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
from backend.app.vision.inference import run_inference, preprocess_image
from backend.app.vision.analyzer import analyze_activity

SCENARIOS = [
    {"name": "browsing", "label": "Deep in Research", "quip": "开这么多标签，CPU 都要哭了~"},
    {"name": "file_mgmt", "label": "Navigating Files", "quip": "在整理文件嘛？需要帮忙吗~"},
    {"name": "idle", "label": "Idle", "quip": "不理我要没电了哦..."},
]

def draw_detections(image: Image.Image, detections: list) -> Image.Image:
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw(image)
    colors = ['#FF0000', '#00FF00', '#0000FF', '#FFFF00', '#FF00FF', '#00FFFF']
    for det in detections:
        cx, cy, w, h = det['bbox']
        x1, y1 = cx - w/2, cy - h/2
        x2, y2 = cx + w/2, cy + h/2
        color = colors[det['class_id'] % len(colors)]
        draw.rectangle([x1, y1, x2, y2], outline=color, width=3)
        label = f"{det['class_name']} {det['confidence']:.2f}"
        draw.text((x1, y1 - 15), label, fill=color)
    return image

def main():
    screenshot_dir = Path("backend/.tmp_cache/vision_screenshots")
    screenshot_path = screenshot_dir / "screenshot_latest.png"

    if not screenshot_path.exists():
        print(f"No screenshot found at {screenshot_path}")
        print("Please run the system first: pnpm dev")
        return

    img = Image.open(screenshot_path)
    detections = run_inference(img)
    analysis = analyze_activity(detections)

    annotated = draw_detections(img.copy(), detections)

    fig_dir = Path("paper/figures")
    fig_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)

    # Save annotated image
    annotated.save(fig_dir / "yolo_detection_case1.png")
    print(f"Saved detection result: {len(detections)} detections")
    print(f"Activity: {analysis['activity_label']}")
    print(f"Elements: {analysis['element_summary']}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

- [ ] **Step 2: 运行截图采集**

确保后端运行中，然后执行：

```bash
python paper/scripts/capture_yolo_detections.py
```

Expected: `paper/figures/yolo_detection_case1.png` 生成，含 bbox 标注

- [ ] **Step 3: 编写 capture_workflow_case.py**

捕获工作流执行的对话日志截图说明（实际截图需手动在运行系统时截取）。

```python
"""Instructions for capturing workflow case screenshots for paper Figure 3.

Run the system with: pnpm dev
Then in the chat window, enter these test cases:

Case 1 - Code Generation:
  Input: "写一个 Python 快速排序"
  Expected flow: keyword_gate=True → coding → workspace.write → LLM extract
  Screenshot: chat window showing input + character response

Case 2 - Auto Repair:
  Input: "运行一个会报错的脚本"
  Expected flow: coding → run.create → execute → fail → repair → success
  Screenshot: chat window showing repair flow

Case 3 - File Search:
  Input: "搜索所有包含 TODO 的文件"
  Expected flow: coding → workspace.search → LLM extract query
  Screenshot: chat window showing search results
"""
print(__doc__)
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**

```bash
git add paper/scripts/
git commit -m "feat(paper): add experiment figure generation scripts"
```

### Task 10: Final Review & Polish

**Files:**
- Modify: `paper/` (all files)

- [ ] **Step 1: 检查引用完整性**

确认正文所有 `\cite{}` 在 `references.bib` 中有对应条目，所有 bib 条目至少被引用一次。

```bash
cd paper && grep -oP '\\cite\{[^}]+\}' main.tex sections/*.tex | sort -u
```

- [ ] **Step 2: 检查图表编号**

确认 `\ref{fig:architecture}`、`\ref{fig:yolo_detection}`、`\ref{fig:workflow_case}`、`\ref{tab:validation}` 在正文中正确引用。

- [ ] **Step 3: 检查公式编号**

确认关键公式有编号（意图分类、参数抽取、YOLOv8 输出、MemoryEvent）。

- [ ] **Step 4: 检查术语一致性**

- "系统提示（system prompt）" 全文统一
- "LangGraph [2]" / "YOLOv8 [13]" 首次出现时带引用
- 中英文混排时英文前后有空格

- [ ] **Step 5: 最终编译**

```bash
cd paper && xelatex main.tex && bibtex main && xelatex main.tex && xelatex main.tex
```

Expected: 最终 PDF，无警告，~15 页

- [ ] **Step 6: Commit**

```bash
git add paper/
git commit -m "chore(paper): final review and polish"
```
